description: Corpus-level guards for structured-text indexing. These assert EMITTED ROWS, not config. array_block shipped dead in 0.109.2 because its only test asserted that json.json DECLARED a block group — never that a block row appeared; scan_block_run walked raw siblings, so JSON's `,` separators broke every run at the first comma and a 201-element array scanned as a run of ONE. The no_positional_* and reorder_preserves_node_ids cases guard the naming ladder's core contract: a node_id follows IDENTITY, never POSITION. If any name ever encoded a slot (steps[0]), two swapped siblings would TRADE node_ids and a handle held for one would silently resolve to the other — mis-targeting a DELETE or CHANGE. Exact-only asserts, so 'at least one' is written as LIMIT 1 + row_count 1.

cases.name: array_block_row_is_actually_emitted
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'array_block' IN 'crates/forgeql/tests/corpus.json' LIMIT 1

cases.name: array_kind_is_emitted_not_merely_documented
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'array' IN '.github/workflows/ci.yml' LIMIT 1

cases.name: workflow_step_without_a_name_key_is_addressable
cases.fql: SHOW outline OF '.github/workflows/ci.yml' ALL WHERE fql_kind = 'object' WHERE name = 'uses' LIMIT 1

cases.name: root_errors_are_the_rare_signal
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'error' WHERE error_scope = 'root'

cases.name: nested_errors_are_the_common_noise
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'error' WHERE error_scope = 'nested'

cases.name: macro_heavy_c_is_nested_noise_not_damage
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'error' WHERE error_scope = 'nested' IN 'kernel/sched.c'

cases.name: no_positional_object_names
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'object' WHERE name MATCHES '\[[0-9]+\]$'

cases.name: no_positional_array_names
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'array' WHERE name MATCHES '\[[0-9]+\]$'

steps.fql: FIND symbols IN 'probe_reorder.yml' WHERE fql_kind = 'object' LIMIT 1

CHANGE NODE '${seed}' WITH <<Y
jobs:
  build:
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: cargo test
Y
FIND symbols IN 'probe_reorder.yml' WHERE fql_kind = 'object' WHERE name = 'uses' LIMIT 1
FIND symbols IN 'probe_reorder.yml' WHERE fql_kind = 'object' WHERE name = 'run' LIMIT 1
FIND symbols IN 'probe_reorder.yml' WHERE fql_kind = 'object' WHERE name = 'jobs' LIMIT 1

CHANGE NODE '${root}' WITH <<Y
jobs:
  build:
    steps:
      - run: cargo test
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
Y
